notes: Bumped after v0.98.1..v0.99.0 sweep (67d483385). UPDATED: features/quotes.mdx (editor overhaul #2711: drag-to-reorder + Contents outline, bulk edit bar, undo delete, collapsed internal cost band + missing-cost warning, last-saved indicator, Unassigned-lines bucket; portal render parity: line images/names/blurbs now on the customer proposal; CAUTION aside: portal accept/decline gated to the emails the quote was sent to (#2679/quote_recipients) and quotes sent pre-v0.99.0 fail closed until re-sent). features/ai.mdx (sole-operator inline 'Verify & Approve' Touch ID/Windows Hello self-approve #2691 — four-eyes case deliberately buttonless; cross-link to the M365 reset-password one-time reveal). features/identity-console.mdx (new 'Retrieving a Microsoft 365 reset password' section #2693: one-time reveal in Approval History, requester-only, 7-day window, APP_ENCRYPTION_KEY_ID self-host caveat). features/mcp-server.mdx (tier corrections per aiGuardrails recalibration #2691: file_operations 2/3 — list Tier 2, read Tier 3; manage_patches scan now Tier 2; manage_tickets time tracking now Tier 2, move_org stays Tier 3; DCR loopback redirect-URI paragraph #2709 — http://localhost accepted alongside 127.0.0.1/[::1], exact-host matching). features/ai-computer-control.mdx (same file_operations tier fixes in 3 places; permissions table corrected — ALL file_operations actions need devices:execute per SR5-01, doc previously claimed devices:read for list/read). features/approval-security.mdx (new 'Enrolling an approver device' section #2710: session-independent step-up — passkey > TOTP > password with stronger-factor refusal (SMS/2FA-off keep password), pending-until-first-approval badge, mobile self-registers on next login, pre-v0.99.0 mobile builds fail registration until updated). reference/users-and-roles.mdx (new 'Admin MFA Reset' section #2696: Settings → Users → Reset MFA / POST /users/:id/mfa/reset, USERS_WRITE + MFA-satisfied session, session+refresh revocation, user.mfa_reset audit, self-reset refused, works under enforced-MFA and ENABLE_2FA=false; endpoint row added). deploy/environment.mdx (removed never-read vars RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS/RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS/SESSION_MAX_AGE/ENABLE_API_DOCS #2712 with a migration note; ENABLE_API_DOCS_UI corrected — standalone flag, default on outside prod/off in prod; new top-of-page compose-parity caution (36 vars newly threaded in v0.99.0 compose); APP_ENCRYPTION_KEY_ID row added (enables v3 sealing, required for M365 reset-password reveal, NOT in stock compose — must be hand-mapped); AGENT_ORG_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN noted as not compose-mapped either). features/reports.mdx (posture report #2706: stale firewall/encryption readings count as unknown, maxSecurityStatusAgeDays default 30 range 1–365, unknown-count summary fields). features/vulnerability-management.mdx (page now honors the org selector #2715; per-device tab deliberately ignores it). features/alerts.mdx (dashboard aside rewritten for #2719: 'Needs attention' feed of active/acknowledged alerts replaces Recent Alerts; exact org-scoped KPI counts). backup/storage.mdx (S3 endpoint normalization #2668: scheme-less → https://, s3:///ftp:// rejected at validation). mapping.json: +9 patterns (aiGuardrails.ts, oauth/redirectUriPolicy.ts, routes/authenticator.ts, components/dashboard/**, shared/utils/s3Endpoint.ts, shared/types/postureReport.ts, routes/portal/quotes.ts, routes/docs.ts, routes/actionIntents.ts). SKIPPED (audience filter / already accurate): Huntress built-in package deploy #2705 (bug fix — edr-integrations.mdx already documents the now-working behavior); contextless device_commands writes #1375 (internal); env-compose parity guard test #2712 (CI-only); quote orphan-line backfill migration internals (only the visible UnassignedLines surface documented); dashboard rebuild not added to getting-started (no page describes dashboard widgets; alerts.mdx aside was the only stale text). NOTE: features/ai.mdx tier matrix was already corrected in #2691 itself (file_operations list→Tier 2) and is bound to aiGuardrails.ts by aiGuardrailsAiDocs.parity.test.ts — new prose added around it deliberately avoids new Tier-headed tables. docsMapping.ts NOT changed — no docs pages added/renamed. VERIFIED: astro build clean.
